box.content: Building Ultra-Fast, Fine-grained Full-stack Apps.

list.text: SolidStart: The future of Solid.js.
Hono: The fast, lightweight web framework.

box.content: Aravind Govindhasamy

list.text: Elite Technical Architect
Full-stack Performance Enthusiast

box.content: File-routing, Islands, and the Zero-Config Dream.
A meta-framework for Solid.js that provides a unified way to build full-stack applications with high performance.

list.text: File-routing: Natural, intuitive structure.
Islands: Partial hydration for maximum client speed.

box.content: SolidStart uses a `src/routes` directory for file-based routing, supporting both static and dynamic segments.
box.code:
src/
  routes/
    index.tsx
    users/
      [id].tsx

box.content: Easily define server-side endpoints within your routing structure using `.api.ts` files.
SolidStart supports various deployment targets like Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare, and Bun through specialized adapters.

list.text: Versatile: Deploy where your users are.
Simple Config: Define your adapter in `app.config.ts`.

box.content: Mastering Solid.js Reactivity.
The fundamental atom of reactivity in Solid.js. They hold a value and track dependencies automatically.
box.code:
const [count, setCount] = createSignal(0);
setCount(c => c + 1);

box.content: A derived signal that caches its value and only re-executes when its dependencies change.
box.code: const doubleCount = createMemo(() => count() * 2);

box.content: Handles side effects that synchronize with reactive state changes.
Solid compiles to direct DOM manipulations, avoiding the overhead of a Virtual DOM diffing process.

list.text: Fast: Incredible performance benchmarks.
Predictable: No hidden reconciliation magic.

box.content: The Hono framework on the Edge.
A small, fast, and runtime-agnostic web framework that runs anywhere: Bun, Node, Cloudflare Workers, etc.

list.text: Performant: One of the fastest routers in existence.
Lightweight: Zero dependencies and tiny bundle size.

box.content: Clean, intuitive API for defining routes and extracting parameters.
Composable middleware for logging, authentication, CORS, and more.
box.code:
app.use('/api/*', logger);
app.use('/admin/*', basicAuth({ ... }));

box.content: The central object for handling requests, responses, environment variables, and more.

list.text: Request: `c.req` for headers, params, body.
Response: `c.json`, `c.text`, `c.html` helper methods.

box.content: Seamless Server Functions in SolidStart.
Functions that always run on the server, but can be called from the client as if they were local asynchronous functions.
Server functions provide automatic type inference between the server implementation and the client call.

list.text: Shared Types: No manual type definitions required.
Validation: Combined with Zod for robust input checking.

box.content: Use `createAction` to handle form submissions and mutations with built-in loading states and feedback.
SolidStart's use of `useTransition` and `useAction` ensures a smooth user experience during data mutations.

list.text: Pending States: Easy access to loading indicators.
Optimistic UI: Update state before the server responds.

box.content: Streaming SSR and Hydration Strategies.
Sending HTML in chunks as it's generated, allowing the browser to start rendering parts of the page earlier.

list.text: Low TTFB: Faster initial page load for users.
Progressive: Components render as soon as their data is ready.

box.content: Only hydrate the interactive parts of your page, keeping the rest as static HTML to minimize JavaScript.
box.code:
// Only this island is hydrated
<Navbar /> 
<StaticContent />
<InteractiveGallery />

box.content: Fine-tuning which components need hydration and when (e.g., on visible, on idle).

list.text: Minimal JS: Dramatically reduce the TTI (Time to Interactive).
Lighthouse: Boost your performance scores significantly.

box.content: Using Hono's weightless footprint to implement smart caching strategies at the network edge.
box.code: app.get('/static/*', cache({ cacheName: 'my-cache', cacheControl: 'max-age=3600' }));

box.content: Mastering Hono RPC and WebSockets.
A feature that allows you to share your API types with your frontend, providing full IDE autocompletion and type checking.
Hono RPC handles dynamic segments and query parameters with full type awareness.
box.code: const res = await client.user[':id'].$get({ param: { id: '123' } });

box.content: Using Hono's WebSocket helpers to build real-time applications that scale globally.
Connecting WebSocket events directly to Solid signals for instant UI updates.

list.text: Live Updates: Push data from Hono to Solid components.
Shared State: Keeping the client and server in perfect sync.

box.content: Adapters, Cloudflare, and Testing.
SolidStart's adapter system makes it easy to target edge runtimes like Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge.
Deploying your Hono backend and SolidStart frontend as a single, ultra-fast Worker.

list.text: Wrangler: Use Cloudflare's CLI for seamless deployment.
Durable Objects: Handle stateful edge computing with ease.

box.content: Fast, Vite-native testing for your Solid components and reactive logic.
Isolated testing of your Hono API logic by calling route handlers directly in your test suite.
box.code:
const res = await app.request('/api/health');
expect(res.status).toBe(200);

box.content: Solid.js Global State and Context.
Providing state to deeply nested components without prop drilling, with full reactivity.
box.code:
const ThemeContext = createContext();
<ThemeContext.Provider value={theme}>...</ThemeContext.Provider>

box.content: A high-performance primitive for managing complex nested objects and arrays with fine-grained updates.
box.code:
const [state, setState] = createStore({ user: { name: 'Solid' } });
setState('user', 'name', 'New Name');

box.content: Signals can be defined outside of components, making them ideal for simple global state sharing.
box.code:
// state.ts
export const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = createSignal(false);

box.content: How Solid's reactivity system eliminates the need for heavy state management libraries like Redux.

list.text: Intuitive: Logic and UI stay perfectly synced.
Decoupled: Easy to move state logic into separate files.

box.content: UnoCSS, Tailwind, and Beyond.
The atomic CSS engine that provides instant styling with zero runtime overhead.
Standardized utility-first styling for consistent design systems.

list.text: Productive: Fast styling directly in your markup.
Design System: Leverage Tailwind's robust ecosystem.

box.content: Using libraries like `vanilla-extract` for type-safe CSS that compiles to static files.
box.code:
import { style } from '@vanilla-extract/css';
export const container = style({ padding: '20px' });

box.content: Combining Solid's reactivity with CSS variables for dynamic, high-performance themes.

list.text: Dark Mode: Instant theme switching without refreshing.
Dynamic Styles: UI that responds to state changes instantly.

box.content: Validation and Shared Logic.
The industry standard for schema-based validation, perfectly integrated with Hono and SolidStart.
box.code:
const UserSchema = z.object({ name: z.string() });
app.post('/user', zValidator('json', UserSchema), (c) => { ... });

box.content: A high-performance alternative to Zod that provides ultra-fast runtime validation with TypeScript inference.
box.code: const User = Type.Object({ name: Type.String() });

box.content: Structuring your project to share business logic and validation schemas across the full-stack boundary.

list.text: Shared Folder: Centralize your schemas and types.
Consistency: Zero drift between client and server logic.

box.content: Unified error responses using Hono's `onError` hook and SolidStart's `ErrorBoundary` component.

list.text: Reliable: Catch and handle errors gracefully.
Fallback UI: Keep your app functional even when things go wrong.

box.content: Your Solid + Hono Journey Begins.
The combination of SolidStart's reactive power and Hono's edge performance is a game-changer for modern web apps.

list.text: Speed: Near-instant interactions and pageloads.
Safety: Types that flow from database to DOM.
Simplicity: A minimalist but powerful developer experience.

box.content: As the ecosystem grows, expect even better tooling, faster runtimes, and more seamless integrations.

list.text: Growth: Solid.js continues to lead in performance.
Innovation: Hono is redefining how we think about web frameworks.

box.content: Think in signals. Deploy to the edge. Build with Solid and Hono.
Thank you! Any questions?
